content:
I know I promised to put out an article every week, and I clearly haven't stuck to that (and not even one week in!). However, there is good reason for that. I have always been fairly disappointed in how this website looked. It was too much and the UX was just lacking. So, I decided to redesign the website.

Major Changes

  • Move from a Quark-based theme to a Hypertext-based theme
  • Eliminate Javascript entirely from the website
  • Use semantic HTML for improved accessibility
  • Move the blogroll to its own page

I promise there is an actual cool thing coming up soon! It's just taking a while to finish that project since it's fairly complicated.

As always, if there is anything about the website that can be improved, feel free to contact me.
